articles.headline: The South American stars who could make Europe moves in 2025
articles.description: Who are the next generation of South American stars to keep an eye out on possibly moving to Europe in 2025?

articles.headline: Uruguay suspends league over Nacional Izquierdo's health
articles.description: Uruguay has halted all football matches this weekend due to the situation surrounding Nacional defender Juan Izquierdo, who is currently hospitalized after collapsing on Thursday night during a Copa Libertadores match.

articles.headline: The tale of Fornaroli and Suárez: Two kids from Salto, Uruguay
articles.description: As a 12-year-old, Bruno Fornaroli met Luis Suárez on a bus on its way to Montevideo. Who knew the soccer paths that lay ahead for both players.

images.name: The problem with Suarez joining Messi at Inter Miami
images.caption: Herc Gomez likes Luis Suarez's proposed move to Inter Miami, but feels it may pose a problem the team cannot ignore.

articles.headline: Liverpool's Darwin Nunez: Anfield legend Suarez warned me not to screw up again
articles.description: Liverpool striker Darwin Nunez has told ESPN that Luis Suarez messaged him with advice after his red card against Crystal Palace.

articles.headline: Luis Suarez always planned for Nacional return, but that doesn't make homecoming any less surreal
articles.description: "I'd like to go back to Nacional one day." Luis Suarez always spoke of returning to his boyhood club, so why is it so hard to believe he's done it?
